name: @gonext/blocks-rich-text
description: Canonical rich-text Edit primitive for GoNext block authoring. Wraps the Lexical editor framework in a single <RichText/> component that core blocks (paragraph, heading, quote, list) and plugin blocks can mount in their edit.tsx. Ships round-trip-safe HTML serialize/deserialize helpers that match the byte-stable canonical HTML emitted by @gonext/blocks-core save() functions, so the editor canvas, persisted block tree, and Go SSR walker all line up. Apache-2.0.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/blocks-rich-text: source-only package, no build step'
